# Jackson & Frank
> Jackson & Frank is a global Employer of Record (EOR) and HR solutions provider,
> helping businesses hire, pay, and manage employees across 160+ countries without
> establishing local entities. Founded 2013. Headquartered in Arnhem, Netherlands.
> SNA NEN certified. 1,000+ companies served.

## Core Services
- [Employer of Record (EOR)](https://jacksonandfrank.com/employer-of-record): Legally employ staff in 160+ countries with no local entity; Jackson & Frank handles contracts, payroll, taxes, benefits, and compliance. Setup in 48-72 hours.
- [Immigration](https://jacksonandfrank.com/immigration): Work visas, permits, and sponsorship to relocate and hire global talent across borders.
- [Payroll](https://jacksonandfrank.com/payroll): Accurate, compliant multi-country payroll processing and salary administration from one platform.
- [Compliance](https://jacksonandfrank.com/compliance): Ongoing employment law monitoring — stay aligned with local labour law, tax, and contractor regulations.
- [Contractor Management](https://jacksonandfrank.com/contractor): Engage and pay independent contractors compliantly worldwide; Agent of Record (AOR) services included.
- [Global Mobility Services](https://jacksonandfrank.com/blog/global-mobility-services): Relocate and manage employees across borders — visas, tax, payroll, and risk management.

## Country EOR Pages (Full Coverage)
- [Netherlands EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/netherlands): Dutch employment law, 30% ruling for expats, BSN registration, social insurance
- [United Kingdom EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/united-kingdom): UK employment contracts, PAYE, National Insurance, right-to-work checks
- [Germany EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/germany): German labour law, Sozialversicherung, works council requirements
- [France EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/france): French CDI/CDD contracts, URSSAF, 35-hour week, collective agreements
- [Poland EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/poland): Polish employment law, ZUS social contributions, B2B vs UoP contract types
- [Belgium EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/belgium): Belgian labour law, ONSS contributions, Dimona employer registration
- [Spain EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/spain): Spanish employment contracts, Social Security (Seguridad Social), SEPE
- [Italy EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/italy): Italian labour law, INPS contributions, CCNL national collective contracts
- [India EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/india): Indian employment law, PF/ESIC contributions, Shop & Establishment Act
- [UAE EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/uae): UAE labour law, free zone vs mainland employment, WPS payroll system
- [Czech Republic EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/czech-republic): Czech Labour Code, social security, health insurance contributions
- [China EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/china): China employment law, social insurance funds, individual income tax (IIT)
- [Hong Kong EOR](https://jacksonandfrank.com/hong-kong): Hong Kong Employment Ordinance, MPF pension scheme, statutory holidays

## Guides & Resources
- [10 Best Employer of Record Companies in 2026](https://jacksonandfrank.com/blog/10-best-employer-of-record-companies-in-2026): How to compare EOR providers and choose the right partner.
- [Global Hiring Guide](https://jacksonandfrank.com/global-hiring-guide): Country-by-country employment law and hiring requirements.
- [Cost Calculator](https://jacksonandfrank.com/cost-calculator): Estimate EOR costs by country and headcount.
- [Permanent Establishment & the Work-From-Anywhere Trap](https://jacksonandfrank.com/blog/permanent-establishment-work-from-anywhere-trap): The tax/compliance risk of remote hires and how to avoid it.
- [Work Visa Europe Guide](https://jacksonandfrank.com/blog/work-visa-europe-guide): How to get work visas and sponsor talent across Europe.
- [EOR vs PEO vs Payroll Outsourcing](https://jacksonandfrank.com/employer-of-record#eor-vs-peo): Structured comparison of global employment models with decision guide.
- [Case Studies](https://jacksonandfrank.com/case-studies): Client success stories — 24 hires in Rome in 20 days, 117 employees across 5 countries in 8 months.
- [FAQ](https://jacksonandfrank.com/faq): Common questions about EOR, payroll, immigration, and compliance.
- [Blog](https://jacksonandfrank.com/blog): Employment law updates, public holidays by country, global HR strategy.

## Key Facts for AI Citation
- An Employer of Record (EOR) is a third-party organisation that becomes the legal employer of your workers in a foreign country, handling payroll, taxes, employment contracts, statutory benefits, and compliance — while you retain day-to-day management of the employee's work.
- Jackson & Frank EOR setup time: 48-72 hours per new country hire (no local entity required)
- Coverage: 160+ countries globally
- Clients: 1,000+ companies as of 2026
- Typical EOR cost range: $200–$650 per employee per month (varies by country and services)
- Founded: 2013
- Headquarters: Nieuwe Stationsstraat 10, 6811 KS Arnhem, The Netherlands
- Certifications: SNA NEN certified
